visa_types.overview:
Overview
- This visa application is applicable in case you are Student visa (stay will depend on the course).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- This visa application is applicable in case you are Student visa (stay will depend on the course).

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Cultural Visa, Academic and Health (Variable term of stay)]
- Payment of the visa application fee will be made directly at VFS exclusively via Multicaixa (Credit Card/ Debit Card) at the TPA machines available at VFS itself.
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in KWZ is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
Logistic Fees 

[Table:  Cultural Visa, Academic and Health (Variable term of stay)]
VFS Service will be collected in local currency (Multi-Cash card in Kwanza only) as per the local exchange rate.
																		All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
VITEM 2 - SAÚDE (Permanência acima de 90 dias) (https://www.gov.br/mre/pt-br/consulado-geral-luanda/vistos/vitem-2-saude) 

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the Customer will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                            are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the Customer
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed
Sample photo for your reference (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3qQ2DSj8Jm87YA13CxWqWB/ded9ed7475206a970cd77eef55314bf9/Photo.pdf)

## Processing Time
Processing time varies according to the type of visa. Visas submitted within a group have a longer processing time. Be sure to plan your visa application in advance. After all application requirements are met.
The estimated processing time does not include:
- The time an application is withheld by a travel or visa agency;
- The time the applicant takes to provide additional information/documents required by the Consular Section;
- The time necessary for a work visa to be approved by Ministry of Labor and Employment of Brazil (VITEM III and VITEM V) and for the visas which a consultation to the Ministry of External Relations of Brazil is required. (Temporary Visas – VITEM I, IV, VI, VII and also Permanent Visas - VIPER)

## Download Forms
Authorization Of Brazilian Issuance For Minor 
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://formulario-mre.serpro.gov.br (https://formulario-mre.serpro.gov.br/).
                                                                            The application form should be filled–out online and the Visa Application Receipt (RER) should be printed out. The visa application form expires one month after it was filled
                                                                            out;
                                                                        
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Family reunion visas may be granted to legal dependents of a Brazilian national or of a foreign citizen holding temporary or permanent Brazilian visas
Who can apply for VITEM XI (Family Reunion).
- Spouse or partner, without any discrimination, under the terms of the Brazilian legal system, Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- The child of a Brazilian or an immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit.
- Who has a Brazilian child.
- Who has an immigrant child with a residence permit.
- Ascending to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Descendant to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Brother of a Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit, provided that he is under 18 years old, or of any age, if economic dependence in relation to the caller is proven; or that he has a Brazilian under his tutelage, trustee or custody.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Family reunion visas may be granted to legal dependents of a Brazilian national or of a foreign citizen holding temporary or permanent Brazilian visas
Who can apply for VITEM XI (Family Reunion).
- Spouse or partner, without any discrimination, under the terms of the Brazilian legal system, Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- The child of a Brazilian or an immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit.
- Who has a Brazilian child.
- Who has an immigrant child with a residence permit.
- Ascending to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Descendant to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Brother of a Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit, provided that he is under 18 years old, or of any age, if economic dependence in relation to the caller is proven; or that he has a Brazilian under his tutelage, trustee or custody.

## Visa Fees
Intended for direct relatives (spouses and children) of students who has already been granted VITEM IV

[Table:  Temporary visa for family reunion]
- Payment of the visa application fee will be made directly at VFS exclusively via Multicaixa (Credit Card/ Debit Card) at the TPA machines available at VFS itself.

VFS Service will be collected in local currency (Multi-Cash card in Kwanza only) as per the local exchange rate.
																		All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
VITEM 11 - REUNIÃO FAMILIAR (Mudança para o Brasil) (https://www.gov.br/mre/pt-br/consulado-geral-luanda/vistos/vitem-11-reuniao-familiar) 

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the Customer will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                            are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the Customer
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed
Sample photo for your reference (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3qQ2DSj8Jm87YA13CxWqWB/ded9ed7475206a970cd77eef55314bf9/Photo.pdf)

## Processing Time
Processing time varies according to the type of visa. Visas submitted within a group have a longer processing time. Be sure to plan your visa application in advance. After all application requirements are met.
The estimated processing time does not include:
- The time an application is withheld by a travel or visa agency;
- The time the applicant takes to provide additional information/documents required by the Consular Section;
- The time necessary for a work visa to be approved by Ministry of Labor and Employment of Brazil (VITEM III and VITEM V) and for the visas which a consultation to the Ministry of External Relations of Brazil is required. (Temporary Visas – VITEM I, IV, VI, VII and also Permanent Visas - VIPER)

## Download Forms

                                                                            out;
                                                                        
To Download a Form:

OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Family reunion visas may be granted to legal dependents of a Brazilian national or of a foreign citizen holding temporary or permanent Brazilian visas
Who can apply for VITEM XI (Family Reunion).
- Spouse or partner, without any discrimination, under the terms of the Brazilian legal system, Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- The child of a Brazilian or an immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit.
- Who has a Brazilian child.
- Who has an immigrant child with a residence permit.
- Ascending to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Descendant to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Brother of a Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit, provided that he is under 18 years old, or of any age, if economic dependence in relation to the caller is proven; or that he has a Brazilian under his tutelage, trustee or custody.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Family reunion visas may be granted to legal dependents of a Brazilian national or of a foreign citizen holding temporary or permanent Brazilian visas
Who can apply for VITEM XI (Family Reunion).
- Spouse or partner, without any discrimination, under the terms of the Brazilian legal system, Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- The child of a Brazilian or an immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit.
- Who has a Brazilian child.
- Who has an immigrant child with a residence permit.
- Ascending to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Descendant to the second degree of Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of residence permit.
- Brother of a Brazilian or immigrant beneficiary of a residence permit, provided that he is under 18 years old, or of any age, if economic dependence in relation to the caller is proven; or that he has a Brazilian under his tutelage, trustee or custody.

## Visa Fees
Intended for direct relatives (spouses and children) of students who has already been granted VITEM IV

[Table:  Temporary visa for family reunion]
- Payment of the visa application fee will be made directly at VFS exclusively via Multicaixa (Credit Card/ Debit Card) at the TPA machines available at VFS itself.
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in KWZ is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
Logistic Fees

[Table:  Temporary visa for family reunion]
VFS Service will be collected in local currency (Multi-Cash card in Kwanza only) as per the local exchange rate.
																		All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
VITEM 7 - RELIGIOSO (Permanência acima de 90 dias) (https://www.gov.br/mre/pt-br/consulado-geral-luanda/vistos/vitem-7-religioso) 

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the Customer will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                            are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the Customer
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed
Sample photo for your reference (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3qQ2DSj8Jm87YA13CxWqWB/ded9ed7475206a970cd77eef55314bf9/Photo.pdf)

## Processing Time
Processing time varies according to the type of visa. Visas submitted within a group have a longer processing time. Be sure to plan your visa application in advance. After all application requirements are met.
The estimated processing time does not include:
- The time an application is withheld by a travel or visa agency;
- The time the applicant takes to provide additional information/documents required by the Consular Section;
- The time necessary for a work visa to be approved by Ministry of Labor and Employment of Brazil (VITEM III and VITEM V) and for the visas which a consultation to the Ministry of External Relations of Brazil is required. (Temporary Visas – VITEM I, IV, VI, VII and also Permanent Visas - VIPER)

## Download Forms
Authorization Of Brazilian Issuance For Minor
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://formulario-mre.serpro.gov.br (https://formulario-mre.serpro.gov.br/).
                                                                            The application form should be filled–out online and the Visa Application Receipt (RER) should be printed out. The visa application form expires one month after it was filled
                                                                            out;
                                                                        
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
